data.title: About
data.metaDescription: Full-stack developer, open source contributor, and cloud architect.
data.bio: I am a full-stack developer with a deep focus on infrastructure, developer tooling, and open source. My work spans from designing type-safe APIs and building deployment pipelines to contributing to the Rust and TypeScript ecosystems. I believe great software is built on clear thinking, clean abstractions, and relentless iteration.

timeline.description: Built real-time analytics platform at DataPulse
First open source project hit 1k stars
